message:
fix(bv): improve error handling order and fallback error context

Two improvements to bv CLI integration error handling:

1. internal/bv/bv.go - Check context timeout before parsing stderr
   - Reorder error checks: context.DeadlineExceeded first
   - Context timeout is more fundamental than stderr content
   - Prevents misleading "No baseline found" errors when the real
     issue is a timeout

2. internal/bv/client.go - Include fallback error in GetInsights
   - When insights fail and triage fallback also fails, include
     both error messages using error wrapping
   - Helps debug cases where multiple code paths fail

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
